description.value:
Elovai collected this small metallic ball and paired glove from a long-destroyed reality, where it was created as a mode of transport.

Activate—Toss and Catch 2 (teleportation)

Frequency once per day

Effect You throw the ball to an unoccupied space you can see within 60 feet. You are teleported to the ball's location, arriving with the ball in your gloved hand. If this would bring another creature with you—even if you are carrying it in an extradimensional container—the teleportation effect fails.

publication.title: Starfinder Society Scenario #1-26: Final Gambit: Part Two
